title: Topic, Headers, and Alternate Routing · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a deterministic Go routing and unroutable-decision table with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a deterministic Go routing and unroutable-decision table and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Design bounded dot-separated topic taxonomies whose stable semantic segments support exact, star, and hash matching; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Enumerate overlapping topic bindings and prove which queues receive one copy even when multiple bindings on the same queue match; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Use headers exchanges only with typed bounded metadata and explicit all-versus-any matching, not as a schema-free routing escape hatch; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle
steps.instruction:
Order the Exchange Chain Cycle RabbitMQ and Go messaging evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Exchange Chain Cycle assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle, keep Exchange Chain Cycle connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A debug Go messaging team handles case 3658 during race-enabled integration test with duplicate delivery. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify primary, alternate, returned, and invalid routing outcomes; reject stale connection and channel generations; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use exchange-to-exchange bindings with bounded graph analysis, route evidence, permission checks, and cycle-safe topology review; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Exchange Chain Cycle has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Exchange Chain Cycle precondition, or invariant that must hold.

Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use exchange-to-exchange bindings with bounded graph analysis, route evidence, permission checks, and cycle-safe topology review; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Exchange chains cannot create duplicate or cyclic routing behavior. In Go, a nil publish error does not establish that any primary queue received the message.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Exchange Chain Cycle structural check is only one gate. a deterministic Go routing and unroutable-decision table must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Exchange Chain Cycle precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug Go messaging team handles case 2561 during bounded worker pool during a dependency slowdown. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify primary, alternate, returned, and invalid routing outcomes; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use exchange-to-exchange bindings with bounded graph analysis, route evidence, permission checks, and cycle-safe topology review; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Exchange chains cannot create duplicate or cyclic routing behavior. In Go, a nil publish error does not establish that any primary queue received the message.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Exchange Chain Cycle: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go messaging team handles case 9942 during table-driven topology review for a tenant migration. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify primary, alternate, returned, and invalid routing outcomes; name the owner and stop path for every goroutine and notification channel; then make one state notification stale after recovery generation changes. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use exchange-to-exchange bindings with bounded graph analysis, route evidence, permission checks, and cycle-safe topology review; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle.
steps.why: Retrieving Exchange Chain Cycle through the concrete a deterministic Go routing and unroutable-decision table case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Exchange Chain Cycle, keep Exchange Chain Cycle connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use exchange-to-exchange bindings with bounded graph analysis, route evidence, permission checks, and cycle-safe topology review; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
